message:
Overhaul conformance test harness for parallel execution and better reporting

- Rewrite test runner with configurable parallelism and timeout handling
- Add structured test context with cleanup hooks and resource management
- Improve error reporting with diff-based assertion failures
- Update harness traits for async test support

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -85,6 +85,9 @@ clap = { version = "4.5", features = ["derive", "env"] }
 # Progress/UI
 indicatif = "0.17"
 
+# Parallelism
+rayon = "1.10"
+
 # Dev dependencies
 criterion = { version = "0.5", features = ["html_reports"] }
 tempfile = "3.10"

@@ -26,6 +26,8 @@ termcolor = "1"            # Colored output
 unicode-normalization = "0.1" # Unicode NFC normalization
 parking_lot = "0.12"       # Thread-safe primitives
 once_cell = "1"            # Lazy statics
+chrono = { workspace = true } # Timestamps
+rayon = { workspace = true }  # Parallel test execution
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 criterion = "0.5"          # Benchmarking
